title: Consume a wrapper with owned IntoIterator
scenario: When callers are done with a wrapper, IntoIterator should let them move owned values out naturally.
instructions: Implement IntoIterator for OrderLines, yielding owned OrderLine values through std::vec::IntoIter<OrderLine>.

hints.body: The item type is OrderLine, not &OrderLine.
Move the inner Vec into its own iterator.

completionExplanation: Callers can now choose ownership transfer with for line in lines when they are done with the wrapper.
